dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Come on, Ali, we can fix this."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Leo, we need to stabilize the plane now. Don't panic."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, sweat dripping down his face.

dialogue.speaker: SAMANTHA
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, eyes fixed intently on the instruments.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "We're experiencing some turbulence, ma'am. Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of SAMANTHA, a poised and charming flight hostess, walking down the aisle.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Just get back to your seat, Leo. We've got this under control."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, fear in his eyes.

dialogue.speaker: SAMANTHA
dialogue.line: "Everyone, please remain calm. We're experiencing some... unexpected maneuvers."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, jaw set in determination.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "We're going to be fine. Just stay seated and—"
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of SAMANTHA, reassuring smile on her face as she grips the seat arms.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of LEO, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Just get back to your seat and stay there. We're almost there."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LEONARD, a mix of gratitude and embarrassment on his face.

dialogue.speaker: SAMANTHA
dialogue.line: "Ladies and gentlemen, we're beginning our descent. Please return to your seats and—"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, a hint of a smile on his face.

dialogue.speaker: KATRINA
dialogue.line: "And don't forget to turn off your electronic devices."
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of SAMANTHA, poised and composed as she walks back to the front of the plane.
